You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Of course, most fences aren't poisoned on top!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「當然，大多數柵欄頂部都沒有毒！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Baba Yaga's hut will squat down if you say the rhyme.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「要是你唸出咒語，芭芭雅嘎的小屋就會蹲下去。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The rhyme is:  'Hut of brown, now sit down'.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「咒語是：『褐色小屋，現在坐下』。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: My time is important, and I'm very busy, as you can well see.  Ask me about something important.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「我的時間很寶貴，我忙得不可開交，你看得出來。問我點重要的事。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Did you get it?  Did you get my glowing gem???
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「你得到了嗎？你拿到我的發光寶石了嗎？」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: I hope you can remember the rhyme.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「我希望你能記得咒語。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I:
Hear me, oh Powers
Of Mana and More:
Turn this fool back
As he was before.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」:
「聽我說，偉大的力量
魔力與更多：
將這個傻瓜變回
原本的樣子。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: As you contemplate the occurrences of the last few minutes, you conclude that you'd better find her mandrake root...and fast!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 當你回顧最近幾分鐘內發生的事件，你得出結論，你最好趕快去找她的曼德拉草根！

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: What an awful creature, to turn me into a FROG!, you say to yourself.  "Someday, I must return the favor."
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「多麼噁心的生物，竟然把我變成青蛙！」你自言自語道。「有一天，我必定要報此仇。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: You see snow and feel a cold wind blowing from the east.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 你看到雪地，感受到從東方吹來的冷風。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The air is crisp here and you can see your breath as you walk. There is a path leading up to a dark mountain, atop which is precariously perched a purple house.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這裡空氣清爽，走路時能看見自己的呼吸。有一條小徑通往黑色山峰，山頂上危險地立著一棟紫色房子。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The path seems to be carved out of the rock.  It forms a steep trail up to the house on the mountain.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 小徑似乎是從岩石上雕刻而成的。它形成了一條通往山上房子的陡峭小道。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: All of the mountains you can see are covered with snow except for the one to which the path leads.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 你看得見的所有山峰都被白雪覆蓋，除了小徑通往的那座山。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The drifts of snow look several feet high in some places.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 某些地方的雪堆有好幾尺高。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Looking north, you see the strange house nestled on its craggy peak.  It is hard to see much at this distance.  All you can tell is that the house is very large, very purple, and very strange.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 向北看，你看到奇怪的房子窩在陡峭的山峰上。從這個距離很難看清楚。你只能看出房子非常大、非常紫、異常詭異。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: To the east is the forest.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 東邊是森林。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: You see the surrounding mountains.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 你看到周圍的山峰。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The clouds skirt the mountain edges.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 雲朵沿著山邊飄動。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: There is a rocky path through the snow.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 雪地裡有一條石頭小道。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: There is nothing here to throw it at.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這裡沒有東西可以扔。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: There's nothing here to dazzle.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這裡沒有東西可以眩目。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The magical aura around this place prevents you from casting a flame dart.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這個地方周圍的魔法氣息阻止了你施放火焰鏢。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I:
Bienvenu a Mont Magie!	「歡迎來到魔法山！
The cliff walls are steep, and it's a long way to the snow fields below.	懸崖陡峭，下面的雪原距離很遠。
You can see the mist flowing around the edges of the Wolf's Bane Peaks.	你可以看到霧氣在狼禍峰的邊緣流動。
Below you, the snow glistens.	你下方的雪地閃閃發光。
Looking down and to the south, you see the tortuous path you climbed to get here. You'd hate to have to do that again.	向下看向南方，你看到你爬上來的曲折小道。你不想再走一遍。
Looking below you to the west, you can see the Baron's Castle surrounded by the forest.	向下看向西方，你可以看到被森林環繞的男爵城堡。
It's about time the gargoyle opened the door for you.	是時候讓石像鬼為你打開門了。
You'd like to look at it more closely, if only the gargoyle would let you.	你想更仔細地看看它，只要石像鬼允許。
You feel as though you have just scaled the Matterhorn in full armor.  What a climb!	你覺得你剛剛穿著全套盔甲爬上了馬特洪峰。真是一次艱難的攀登！
The climb seems much longer this time, but you made it!	這次的攀登似乎更長，但你做到了！
DO NOT DISTURB THE WIZARD AT REST!"
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「勿擾，巫師正在休息！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: OH!  YOU AGAIN!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「哦！又是你！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: HE WHO WOULD THE WIZARD SEE\nFIRST MUST ANSWER QUESTIONS THREE.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「想見巫師者\n必先答三題。」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: BEAT IT, BUB!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「滾蛋，老兄！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: WRONG!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「錯誤！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: ASKING QUESTIONS\nIS *MY* JOB, BUB!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 提問\n是我的工作，老兄！

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: NO THIEVES ALLOWED!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「禁止盜賊進入！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The Wizard is not running an inn.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 巫師不經營客棧。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: THAT'S NOT NICE!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「那不太好！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: WHAT IS THE MEAN AIRSPEED\nOF AN UNLADEN SWALLOW?
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「無裝載的燕子\n平均時速是多少？」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: IS IT FURTHER TO SHAPEIR,\nOR BY CAMEL?
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「去夏皮爾距離更遠，\n還是騎駱駝？」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: IS THIS A YES OR NO QUESTION?
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「這是不是一個是或否的問題？」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: WHAT IS THE BARON'S FIRST NAME?
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「男爵的名字是什麼？」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: WHOSE SPELL PROTECTS THE TOWN?
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「誰的法術保護了這個鎮？」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: GOOD.  YOU'RE NOT A THIEF!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 「很好。你不是盜賊！」

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: THAT IS CORRECT.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 那是正確的。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: THE WIZARD WILL NOW SEE YOU.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 巫師現在會見你。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: GO DIRECTLY UP TO THE TOWER.\nDO NOT DALLY!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 直接上塔。\n不要磨蹭！

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Through the portal to the east is a large formal dining room.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 通往東邊的傳送門是一間寬敞的正式餐廳。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Through the portal to the west is a small sitting room.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 通往西邊的傳送門是一間小客廳。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Against the east wall, you see a bookcase and a desk, above which is hung a dragon's head trophy.  These are on either side of a doorway, above which hangs a shield.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 東牆上，你看到一個書架和一張書桌，上面掛著龍頭戰利品。這些位於一道門的兩側，上面掛著一面盾牌。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Leaning against the west wall is a mummy case.  Above that hangs an ancient tapestry.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 靠在西牆上的是一具木乃伊棺。上面掛著一幅古老的掛毯。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The wall is plain.  You see nothing but the front door of the house.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 牆很簡樸。你只看到房子的前門。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Above the staircase hangs a portrait, flanked by decorative wall hangings.  In an alcove on the landing stands a suit of armor.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 樓梯上方掛著一幅肖像，兩側是裝飾性的牆飾。著陸台的壁龕中擺著一套盔甲。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: There is a table up against the staircase wall, and on the wall hangs an onklunk.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 樓梯牆邊有一張桌子，牆上掛著一個翁克倫克。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The Ball of Light floats magically over the center of the room.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 光球在房間中央上方魔法地漂浮著。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: You can make out the runes imprinted on the\nstrange device:  "Acme Toy Co."
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 你可以看出刻在\n奇怪裝置上的符文：「美國精品玩具公司」。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Oh my!  It's a Dunking Dragon!  You thought they were only to be found in myths and legends.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 天哪！這是一條浸擊龍！你以為它們只存在於神話和傳說中。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: It is a standard roll-top desk.  There is nothing on it.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這是一張標準的捲簾式桌子。上面什麼都沒有。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The suit of armor was made for someone much taller than you.   The plaque underneath it reads:\n  "Bequeathed by Colonel Gulden Dijon."
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這套盔甲是為比你高得多的人製作的。下面的銘牌寫著：\n「金牛上校古爾登‧迪戎遺贈」。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: You have no idea what it is, but it has the words "Lytton P. D." inscribed upon it.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 你不知道這是什麼，但它上面刻著「利頓警察局」。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Dredging up your ancient Egyptian,\nyou translate the hieroglyphs:\n  "She of the golden hair."
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 挖掘你的古埃及知識，\n你翻譯了象形文字：\n「金髮女子」。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: This is an excerpt from the Rosella Stone!  There is a picture next to the message.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 這是羅塞塔石碑的節錄！訊息旁邊有一幅圖片。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: By golly, it's a rare Peruvian Onklunk!
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 天哪，這是一個罕見的祕魯翁克倫克！

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: This item appears to be an ebony chest. It could contain anything.

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: The table is bare, except for a stuffed bird which faces the door.

「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 盾牌看起來像是屬於某位「曾經與未來」國王的。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: There is a strange figure on a shelf above the stairs.  It looks like an overgrown rat wearing a wizard's hat.
「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 樓梯上方架子上有一個奇怪的人物。看起來像一隻戴著巫師帽的巨大老鼠。

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: An adumbrated wall hanging.  It's design evokes thoughts of ancient times and battles past.

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: There are two finely crafted chairs, one larger than the other.

You've seen one, you've seen them all, I: Beneath the "Dunking Dragon" is an old steamer trunk.

「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 如果我是你，我就不這樣做！

「你看過一隻就看過全部了，我這麼說。」: 你必須先在魔法藝術中磨練更多技能。
